title: Extreme Weather Shelters - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Disaster Services > Extreme Weather Shelters 45 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Homeless Couples Homeless Families Homeless Youth Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness 211INFO WINTER AND SEVERE WEATHER INFORMATION SERVICES MULTNOMAH COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Seasonal winter shelters may be open in addition to severe cold weather shelters that may be activated when a severe weather notice is issued by Homeless Service Department (HSD). The criteria used to determine a severe weather notice in Multnomah County and the corresponding opening of emergency warming centers are: -Temperatures forecast at 25°F or below OR -Forecasts predict at least an inch of snow in most areas OR -Overnight temperatures forecast at 32°F or below, with at least an inch of driving rain OR -Other conditions, including severe wind chills or extreme temperature fluctuations Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Winter shelters are open throughout the winter season, and severe weather shelters may be activated during times of severe weather between November 1-March 31 each year. Hours vary. Email 211 Visit Website More Details COOLING CENTERS CLACKAMAS COUNTY SOCIAL SERVICES DIVISION COOLING SHELTER LOCATOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on cooling centers during an extreme heat event. May offer additional cooling resources. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Cooling centers operate during heat advisories. Locations are open either throughout the summer season or when temperature thresholds are met.
